insuranceProviders.name: Star Health Insurance
insuranceProviders.description: Star Health and Allied Insurance is India's first standalone health insurance company and the largest in the sector. Known for comprehensive health plans, wide network, and efficient claim processing. Star Health pioneered products like Diabetes Safe and Senior Citizens Red Carpet plans.

plans.name: Family Health Optima
plans.description: Comprehensive family floater with restoration benefit and coverage for 1000+ procedures

plans.name: Comprehensive
plans.description: Complete protection with hospital daily cash and maternity benefits

plans.name: Young Star
plans.description: Specially designed for ages 18-40 with wellness benefits

plans.name: Senior Citizens Red Carpet
plans.description: Tailored for 60+ age group with pre-existing disease coverage after 1 year

plans.name: Diabetes Safe
plans.description: India's first policy covering Type 1 & Type 2 diabetics

keyFeatures: No medical checkup up to 50L sum insured

insuranceProviders.name: HDFC ERGO Health Insurance
insuranceProviders.description: HDFC ERGO is one of India's leading general insurance companies, known for its Optima range of health insurance products that offer comprehensive coverage with flexible options. A joint venture between HDFC Ltd and ERGO International AG.

plans.name: Optima Secure
plans.description: Premium plan with unlimited automatic recharge and no claim bonus up to 100%

plans.name: Optima Restore
plans.description: Family floater with restore benefit - sum insured restored for unrelated claims

plans.name: My Health Suraksha
plans.description: Affordable comprehensive coverage with optional add-ons

keyFeatures: Restore benefit - sum insured restored for unrelated claims

insuranceProviders.name: ICICI Lombard Health Insurance
insuranceProviders.description: ICICI Lombard is one of the largest private sector general insurance companies in India, offering a wide range of health insurance products backed by strong service network. Known for quick claim settlements and digital-first approach.

plans.name: Complete Health Insurance
plans.description: Comprehensive protection with modern treatment coverage

plans.name: iHealth
plans.description: Premium plan with air ambulance cover and hospital daily cash

plans.name: Arogya Sanjeevani
plans.description: Standardized affordable health insurance mandated by IRDAI

insuranceProviders.name: Niva Bupa (Max Bupa)
insuranceProviders.description: Niva Bupa (formerly Max Bupa) combines Indian market knowledge with Bupa's global healthcare expertise to offer comprehensive health insurance solutions. One of the highest claim settlement ratios in the industry.

plans.name: ReAssure
plans.description: Premium plan with comprehensive coverage and OPD benefit

plans.name: Health Companion
plans.description: Complete protection with mental illness coverage

plans.name: Heartbeat
plans.description: Covers 53 critical illnesses with lump sum payout

keyFeatures: No room rent capping in premium plans

insuranceProviders.name: Daman Insurance
insuranceProviders.description: National Health Insurance Company (Daman) is the largest health insurer in the UAE, established in partnership with the Abu Dhabi government. It manages the mandatory Thiqa program for UAE nationals and serves over 3 million members.

plans.name: Thiqa
plans.description: Mandatory government program for UAE nationals with comprehensive coverage

plans.name: Saada
plans.description: Enhanced private coverage with dental and optical

plans.name: Corporate Health
plans.description: Flexible group plans for businesses

keyFeatures: Mandatory coverage provider for Abu Dhabi

insuranceProviders.name: AXA Gulf Insurance
insuranceProviders.description: AXA is a global insurance leader with strong presence in UAE and GCC, offering comprehensive health insurance solutions for individuals and corporates. Part of AXA Group, one of the world's largest insurers.

plans.name: Gold Health
plans.description: Premium coverage with global options and executive benefits

plans.name: SmartHealth
plans.description: Smart choice for essential coverage with wellness benefits

plans.name: Corporate Health
plans.description: Customizable group plans for SMEs and corporates

insuranceProviders.name: Bupa UK
insuranceProviders.description: Bupa is the UK's leading private health insurer, serving millions of customers with comprehensive health insurance, dental plans, and health services. Known for fast access to specialists and mental health support.

plans.name: Treatment and Care
plans.description: Fast access to treatment for new conditions

plans.name: Comprehensive
plans.description: Our most complete cover including therapies and mental health

plans.name: By You
plans.description: Build your own plan with modules you need

plans.name: Cash Plan
plans.description: Affordable plan that pays cash towards everyday healthcare costs

insuranceProviders.name: Allianz Ayudhya Thailand
insuranceProviders.description: Allianz Ayudhya is Thailand's leading life and health insurer, combining global Allianz expertise with local market knowledge. Known for comprehensive coverage and strong service network.

plans.name: My Health Plus
plans.description: Comprehensive health coverage with wellness benefits

plans.name: Prestige Health
plans.description: Premium coverage with international options

plans.name: Allianz Care
plans.description: Family-focused plan with maternity benefits
